name: l2_powered_source_coupling_readiness_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceCouplingReadinessGate is the final runtime coupling gate for powered-source evidence.
note: Final powered-source runtime coupling readiness layer.

name: l2_powered_source_acceptance_handoff
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceAcceptanceHandoff aggregates hover and cruise validation candidates before acceptance gates.
note: Handoff evidence required by this coupling gate.

name: l2_actuator_disk_representation_policy
value: Aerodynamics4McL2ActuatorDiskRepresentationPolicy keeps rotor disks open and blocks runtime mutation until powered source support is validated.
note: Representation policy evidence required by this coupling gate.

name: l2_powered_hover_acceptance_gate
note: Hover acceptance gate feeding runtime coupling readiness.

name: l2_powered_cruise_acceptance_gate
note: Cruise acceptance gate feeding runtime coupling readiness.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future powered body-force or porous-source request support.
note: Upstream CFD target for future powered source runtime coupling evidence.

name: powered_source_coupling_readiness_gate
value: Do not let powered-source L2 evidence affect runtime physics until hover and cruise acceptance handoffs are ready and every actuator-disk representation policy keeps rotor disks open with runtime mutation explicitly allowed.
note: Method keeps final runtime coupling separate from missing powered-source evidence and gameplay tuning.
